markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify if Pylon can bridge Slack-Teams communication for external partners.](https://fathom.video/share/-2iq1NvU8xkzFikF6J-8asds-wwWqK_w?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Mismatched Needs:** Growthx requires a Slack-Teams federation broker for external partners; Pylon is an internal tool for consolidating channels within a single organization.](https://fathom.video/share/-2iq1NvU8xkzFikF6J-8asds-wwWqK_w?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [**Technical Blocker:** Pylon requires direct admin access to connect a Teams account, which is impossible for external partners.](https://fathom.video/share/-2iq1NvU8xkzFikF6J-8asds-wwWqK_w?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**Prior Disqualification:** Growthx previously disqualified Pylon for a support platform use case, selecting Intercom instead.](https://fathom.video/share/-2iq1NvU8xkzFikF6J-8asds-wwWqK_w?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [**Action:** Nano will confirm the technical blocker and seek feedback on why Growthx chose Intercom, which helps Pylon's product evolution.](https://fathom.video/share/-2iq1NvU8xkzFikF6J-8asds-wwWqK_w?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)

## Topics

### Growthx's Use Case: External Federation

  - [**Goal:** Bridge communication with external partners whose security policies mandate Microsoft Teams.](https://fathom.video/share/-2iq1NvU8xkzFikF6J-8asds-wwWqK_w?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [**Requirement:** A federation broker to enable collaboration via shared channels/DMs without either party adopting the other's platform.](https://fathom.video/share/-2iq1NvU8xkzFikF6J-8asds-wwWqK_w?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [**Context:** This is a separate need from a support platform, for which Growthx selected Intercom.](https://fathom.video/share/-2iq1NvU8xkzFikF6J-8asds-wwWqK_w?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)

### Pylon's Capability: Internal Consolidation

  - [**Primary Value:** Consolidate internal conversations from multiple platforms (Slack, Teams, email, WhatsApp) into one dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/-2iq1NvU8xkzFikF6J-8asds-wwWqK_w?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [**Technical Requirement:** Requires direct admin access to connect a Teams account.](https://fathom.video/share/-2iq1NvU8xkzFikF6J-8asds-wwWqK_w?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**Limitation:** This requirement makes it unsuitable for external federation, as Growthx cannot get admin access to a partner's Teams instance.](https://fathom.video/share/-2iq1NvU8xkzFikF6J-8asds-wwWqK_w?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

### Prior Engagement & Feedback

  - [**History:** Growthx colleagues (Leah, Andy, William) demoed Pylon in early December for a support platform use case.](https://fathom.video/share/-2iq1NvU8xkzFikF6J-8asds-wwWqK_w?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [**Outcome:** Growthx disqualified Pylon and selected Intercom.](https://fathom.video/share/-2iq1NvU8xkzFikF6J-8asds-wwWqK_w?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [**Pylon's Interest:** Nano requested feedback on the decision to inform product evolution.](https://fathom.video/share/-2iq1NvU8xkzFikF6J-8asds-wwWqK_w?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [**Competitor:** Growthx is also evaluating `conclude.io`.](https://fathom.video/share/-2iq1NvU8xkzFikF6J-8asds-wwWqK_w?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nano:** Confirm the technical blocker (need for external partner's Teams admin access) and seek feedback on why Growthx chose Intercom.](https://fathom.video/share/-2iq1NvU8xkzFikF6J-8asds-wwWqK_w?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [**Yousef:** Provide feedback on the Intercom decision if available.](https://fathom.video/share/-2iq1NvU8xkzFikF6J-8asds-wwWqK_w?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
